data.html:
generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
  url      = env("POSTGRES_URL")
}

model Allergene {
  id          String              @id @default(cuid())
  nome        String              @unique
  descrizione String?
  icona       String?
  createdAt   DateTime            @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime            @updatedAt
  articoli    AllergeneArticolo[]
}

model Categoria {
  id        String     @id @default(cuid())
  nome      String     @unique
  ordine    Int        @default(0)
  attiva    Boolean    @default(true)
  createdAt DateTime   @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime   @updatedAt
  articoli  Articolo[]
}

model Articolo {
  id                 String              @id @default(cuid())
  nome               String
  descrizione        String?
  categoriaId        String
  prezzo             Float
  prezzoPromozionale Float?
  scadenzaPromo      DateTime?
  eSurgelato         Boolean             @default(false)
  eBestChoice        Boolean             @default(false)
  attivo             Boolean             @default(true)
  immagineUrl        String?
  immagineAiGenerata Boolean             @default(false)
  createdAt          DateTime            @default(now())
  updatedAt          DateTime            @updatedAt
  allergeni          AllergeneArticolo[]
  categoria          Categoria           @relation(fields: [categoriaId], references: [id])
}

model AllergeneArticolo {
  id          String    @id @default(cuid())
  articoloId  String
  allergeneId String
  articolo    Articolo  @relation(fields: [articoloId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  allergene   Allergene @relation(fields: [allergeneId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([articoloId, allergeneId])
}

model SiteInfo {
  id                 String   @id @default(cuid())
  nomeLocale         String   @default("Il Nostro Ristorante")
  slogan             String?
  chiSiamoTitolo     String?
  chiSiamoTesto      String?
  chiSiamoImageUrl   String?
  logoUrl            String?
  faviconUrl         String?
  telefono           String?
  email              String?
  prenotazioniAttive Boolean  @default(true)
  heroTitle          String?  @default("Autentica Cucina Italiana")
  heroSubtitle       String?
  heroCTAText        String?  @default("Scopri il Menu")
  heroImageUrl       String?
  heroOverlayOpacity Float    @default(0.5)
  specialitaTitle    String?  @default("Le Nostre Specialità")
  specialitaSubtitle String?
  primaryColor       String?  @default("#ea580c")
  primaryForeground  String?  @default("#ffffff")
  seoTitle           String?  @default("Z.ai Code Scaffold - AI-Powered Development")
  seoDescription     String?  @default("Modern Next.js scaffold optimized for AI-powered development with Z.ai. Built with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui.")
  seoKeywords        String?  @default("Z.ai, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, AI development, React")
  seoOgTitle         String?
  seoOgDescription   String?
  seoOgImage         String?
  seoTwitterCard     String?  @default("summary_large_image")
  seoRobots          String?
  seoCanonical       String?
  createdAt          DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt          DateTime @updatedAt
}

model SiteImage {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  sezione     String
  titolo      String?
  descrizione String?
  url         String
  ordine      Int      @default(0)
  attiva      Boolean  @default(true)
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt
}

model FooterInfo {
  id             String   @id @default(cuid())
  indirizzo      String?
  citta          String?
  cap            String?
  provincia      String?
  latitudine     Float?
  longitudine    Float?
  orariApertura  String?
  giorniChiusura String?
  telefono       String?
  facebookUrl    String?
  instagramUrl   String?
  twitterUrl     String?
  linkedinUrl    String?
  whatsappUrl    String?
  tiktokUrl      String?
  justeatUrl     String?
  deliverooUrl   String?
  glovoUrl       String?
  ubereatsUrl    String?
  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime @updatedAt
}

model User {
  id        String      @id @default(cuid())
  email     String      @unique
  nome      String
  cognome   String?
  password  String
  ruolo     String      @default("admin")
  createdAt DateTime    @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime    @updatedAt
  permessi  Permission?
}

model Permission {
  id                     String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId                 String   @unique
  puoGestireMenu         Boolean  @default(true)
  puoGestireFooter       Boolean  @default(true)
  puoGestireTemi         Boolean  @default(true)
  puoGestirePrenotazioni Boolean  @default(true)
  puoGestireDatiAzienda  Boolean  @default(true)
  puoGestireProfili      Boolean  @default(false)
  puoGestireAnalytics    Boolean  @default(true)
  puoGestireSito         Boolean  @default(true)
  puoGestireEventi       Boolean  @default(true)
  createdAt              DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt              DateTime @updatedAt
  user                   User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
}

model CompanyData {
  id                       String    @id @default(cuid())
  ragioneSociale           String?
  partitaIva               String?
  codiceFiscale            String?
  indirizzo                String?
  citta                    String?
  cap                      String?
  provincia                String?
  paese                    String?
  telefono                 String?
  email                    String?
  pec                      String?
  dpoNome                  String?
  dpoEmail                 String?
  dpoIndirizzo             String?
  privacyPolicy            String?
  privacyEnabled           Boolean   @default(true)
  privacyUrl               String?
  privacyPolicyUpdate      DateTime?
  cookiesPolicy            String?
  cookiesEnabled           Boolean   @default(true)
  cookiesUrl               String?
  cookiesPolicyUpdate      DateTime?
  cookieTecnici            Boolean   @default(true)
  cookieAnalitici          Boolean   @default(true)
  cookieMarketing          Boolean   @default(true)
  showCookieBanner         Boolean   @default(true)
  cookieBannerText         String?   @default("Questo sito utilizza cookie tecnici e analitici per migliorare la tua esperienza di navigazione. Cliccando su 'Autorizzo', accetti l'uso dei cookie.")
  cookieAcceptText         String?   @default("Autorizzo")
  cookieDeclineText        String?   @default("Annulla")
  terminiServizio          String?
  terminiUrl               String?
  thirdPartyScriptsEnabled Boolean   @default(true)
  googleAnalyticsId        String?
  facebookPixelId          String?
  amazonTagId              String?
  adSenseId                String?
  adSenseSlotHorizontal    String?
  adSenseSlotRectangle     String?
  adSenseSlotTop           String?
  adSenseSlotInline        String?
  createdAt                DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt                DateTime @updatedAt
}

model Reservation {
  id        String    @id @default(cuid())
  nome      String
  cognome   String
  email     String
  telefono  String
  data      String
  ora       String
  persone   Int
  note      String?
  stato     String    @default("pending")
  eventoId  String?   // Collegamento all'evento
  evento    Evento?   @relation(fields: [eventoId], references: [id])
  createdAt DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime  @updatedAt
}

model Evento {
  id               String        @id @default(cuid())
  titolo           String
  slug             String        @unique
  descrizione      String
  descrizioneBreve String
  immagineUrl      String?
  data             DateTime
  oraInizio        String
  oraFine          String
  prezzo           Float         @default(0)
  etichettaPrezzo  String?
  gratuito         Boolean       @default(false)
  graditaPrenotazione Boolean     @default(false)
  capacita         Int           @default(0)
  postiDisponibili Int           @default(0)
  location         String?
  incluso          String?
  infoAggiuntive   String?
  inEvidenza       Boolean       @default(false)
  nuovo            Boolean       @default(false)
  createdAt        DateTime      @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime      @updatedAt
  prenotazioni     Reservation[] // Relazione con le prenotazioni
}

model AnalyticsEvent {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  sessionId String
  eventType String
  pageUrl   String
  productId String?
  duration  Int?
  referrer  String?
  userAgent String?
  ipHash    String?
  country   String?
  city      String?
  timestamp DateTime @default(now())
}

model AnalyticsDaily {
  id                 String   @id @default(cuid())
  date               DateTime @unique
  totalVisits        Int      @default(0)
  uniqueVisitors     Int      @default(0)
  pageViews          String?
  avgSessionDuration Int      @default(0)
  hourlyBreakdown    String?
  topPages           String?
  productViews       String?
  conversionData     String?
  createdAt          DateTime @default(now())
}

model AnalyticsWeekly {
  id                 String   @id @default(cuid())
  weekStartDate      DateTime
  weekEndDate        DateTime
  totalVisits        Int      @default(0)
  uniqueVisitors     Int      @default(0)
  avgDailyVisits     Float    @default(0)
  bestDayOfWeek      String?
  bestHourOfDay      Int?
  topProducts        String?
  conversionInsights String?
  priceInsights      String?
  createdAt          DateTime @default(now())
}

model AnalyticsMonthly {
  id              String   @id @default(cuid())
  month           String
  year            Int
  totalVisits     Int      @default(0)
  uniqueVisitors  Int      @default(0)
  avgDailyVisits  Float    @default(0)
  bestDayOfWeek   String?
  bestHourOfDay   Int?
  avgWeeklyVisits Float    @default(0)
  growthRate      Float    @default(0)
  productInsights String?
  priceInsights   String?
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())
}

model AnalyticsYearly {
  id               String   @id @default(cuid())
  year             Int      @unique
  totalVisits      Int      @default(0)
  uniqueVisitors   Int      @default(0)
  avgMonthlyVisits Float    @default(0)
  bestMonth        String?
  overallTrend     String?
  productInsights  String?
  priceInsights    String?
  createdAt        DateTime @default(now())
}

model BannerPubblicitario {
  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
  tipo         String
  posizione    String
  sponsorNome  String
  sponsorLogo  String?
  sponsorUrl   String
  titolo       String?
  descrizione  String?
  ctaTesto     String?
  ctaUrl       String?
  immagineUrl  String?
  coloreSfondo String?
  attivo       Boolean  @default(true)
  ordine       Int      @default(0)
  pagine       String?
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime @updatedAt
}
